case_title: CRUZ, JOSE MANUEL VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF CLAIMS et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF CLAIMS MUNICIPAL RAILWAY CLAIMS DEPT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CRUZ, JOSE MANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF CLAIMS MUNICIPAL RAILWAY CLAIMS DEPT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRUZ, JOSE MANUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF CLAIMS MUNICIPAL RAILWAY CLAIMS DEPT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
